riddle:
1. Seek the short biographical page about an Irish hurler; which county did he represent at inter-county level?

2. Now, take the county name you unearthed in clue 1 and count how many vowel letters it contains — that total is your next number.

3. Track down the county’s senior hurling team article and read where they host their home matches; what is the name of that ground?

4. There exists a neighboring county team (linked from that page) — discover the name of their own home ground.

5. What single-digit count answers this: how many of the provinces’ counties have hoisted the provincial senior hurling trophy at least once?

6. What is the total number of matches played in the specified southern hemisphere provincial rugby competition season referenced by the next search?

7. Before moving on, find the sum of the digits of the match-count you just noted in clue 6.

8. Consider the page about the capital’s professional rugby league club: convert six metres into whole feet and report that integer.

9. What was the total number of selections made in the North American professional football draft of 2005?

10. On the page for the main pan-European professional golf organisation, convert 255 degrees Celsius into the Fahrenheit-scale offset by multiplying by 1.8 and report the whole-number result.

11. Who founded the football franchise that played for decades in San Diego before relocating: on its page, in which year is the club said to have been established?

12. Take the year from clue 11 and compute the sum of its distinct prime factors; that sum is your next value.

13. How many minutes does a typical driving route take from Albany to the Jacob K. Javits Convention Center in Manhattan?

14. On the NFL season overview for 2005, what are the regular-season start and end dates (the season’s span)?

15. The American college football programme referenced later: in which city and state is that team based?

16. Using a map search for parks near Rochester, how many park results are returned?

17. Turn to the match-play golf championship’s page: in what year was this event first established?

18. Now determine how many positive divisors the establishment year from clue 17 has.

19. What is the elevation, in metres above sea level, at the named Senate building in the national capital of Bangladesh?

20. Finally, compute the single-digit answer: take the absolute difference between clue 13 and clue 16, then take that result modulo 10 — report abs(clue 13 - clue 16) % 10.

metadata.theme: From a local hurler to global sport: trace how an Irish athlete's world (Jer Collison) connects to teams, championships and the logistics and numbers that shape modern sport across codes and continents.
